title: aeluropus littoralis var. repens
intro: Aeluropus littoralis var. repens, also known as the sea couch grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of sea couch grass include its ability to soothe respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of sea couch grass can be made into infusions, teas, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a convenient and accessible way.
